entries.note: Leia seeks the Mon Calamari's aid as the Resistance regroups.
Rey, Poe, Finn, and Rose on a mission shortly after The Last Jedi.
A Force-sensitive teen chasing lost Jedi history across the galaxy.
The Resistance rebuilds its alliances directly before the film.
Ben Solo's fall and the forming of the Knights of Ren.

summary: The 2019 publishing program leading into Episode IX. Resistance novels and the backstory of Kylo Ren, in release order.
title: Journey to Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker
